{"query":"Palworld version 1.0 Lily Tower new map location waypoint modifications","model":"mako","response_time_ms":811,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.thebiglead.com/palworld-1-0-patch-notes/","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Everything new in the official launch","content":"8 days ago — Two major areas have been added with this update. Watchtowers that you can climb to reveal the nearby map; new Settlements with NPCs, shops, ...
If you’ve been playing Palworld throughout its early access, then it’s highly recommended that you start a fresh playthrough for this update, as it’s going to be a significantly different experience to start from scratch.
On top of this, there are new smaller features scattered throughout the world, including: Ancient Ruins that task you with small minigames with powerful schematics as rewards; Watchtowers that you can climb to reveal the nearby map; new Settlements with NPCs, shops, and side quests; and various small islands dotted around the place.
The game’s main story is complete in this update and has seen a rework that now has a better-flowing main and sub-quest system.
There is a new mystical area open somewhere on the Palworld map where you can find Radiant Gems."},{"url":"https://palworld.fandom.com/wiki/Version_1.0","title":"Version 1.0 | Palworld Wiki | Fandom","content":"8 days ago — This version of Palworld was released on the 10th of July 2026. Floating above Palpagos, a new set of islands has appeared in the skies!
- Watchtowers Watchtowers have been added in various locations.
- Removed the Great Eagle Statue from the top of the tower bosses, improving map visibility.
- Adjusted the appearance of Sealed Realms.
We've added a new mechanic, Awakening, that lets you strengthen your Pals even further.
A new type of glider, the Wing Pack, has been added!
The Wing Pack consumes Wing Cells to allow for highly free flight without relying on a Pal.
A new gathering tool, the Plasma Multicutter, has been added!
- Plasma Rifle · A rifle that releases electrical arcs from the point of impact, chaining between multiple enemies.
Added Soralite and Paloxite as new ores.
- Aquatic Construction: An Aquatic Construction Kit has been added, allowing you to build bases along shorelines and at sea.
(Only supported on the Steam and Mac versions)"},{"url":"https://www.g2a.com/news/features/everything-coming-in-the-palworld-1-0-update/","title":"Everything Coming in the Palworld 1.0 Update - G2A News","content":"Palworld 1.0 launches on July 10, 2026, marking the game’s full release after its Early Access period.
The World Tree appears to be a major new area and story focus.
The update marks the game’s full release and is expected to arrive on PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Game Pass.
Wildlife Sanctuaries are getting attention too.
These areas are being redesigned with more distinct terrain, materials, rare Pals, and new bosses, helping each sanctuary feel less like a repeated map feature and more like its own dangerous destination.
Tower Bosses: Reworked encounters with more dynamic mechanics.
New Pals, World Tree content, boss reworks, sanctuary updates, water building, and story expansion should make July 10 a major moment for returning players."},{"url":"https://www.gamespot.com/articles/everything-new-in-palworld-1-0/","title":"Everything New In Palworld 1.0 - New Pals, Mechanics, ...","date":"4 days ago","content":"4 days ago — Palworld has left early access with its 1.0 release that adds new areas, new pals, world improvements, new tools, and much more.Read more"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Palworld version 1.0 Lily Tower new map location waypoint modifications","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://palworld.fandom.com/wiki/Version_1.0","title":"Version 1.0 - Palworld Wiki - Fandom","content":"With the release of *Palworld*, a lot of information here may no longer be relevant and needs updating. Please feel free to jump in and help out! Sunreach introduces a wide range of new content, including new Pals, tower bosses, and ores that can only be mined using specialized equipment. The key to the story of Palworld is the **World Tree**, towering over Palpagos, and it is here that players will face their greatest challenge yet. In addition, enemy bases have been added at sea, further expanding the stage for exploration and combat. Many new technologies related to the ancient civilization have been added. New NPCs and Journals have also been added across the world, letting you learn more about the world of Palworld through exploration. Additionally, we've made numerous adjustments to make it easier to include a wider variety of Pals in your team and allow them to play a more active role.","score":0.63179934,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.thebiglead.com/palworld-1-0-patch-notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Everything new in the official ...","content":"If you’ve been playing Palworld throughout its early access, then it’s highly recommended that you start a fresh playthrough for this update, as it’s going to be a significantly different experience to start from scratch. Whether you’re one of those players starting fresh or a brand new one who’s hopped onto the bandwagon for this finally complete experience, here’s a summary of everything that’s new/changed in Palworld 1.0. In this case, a whopping total of 72 new Pals have been added to the game. You’ll find the majority of them roaming the new areas added in this update (more on those shortly), but some have been added to the existing areas too; you’ll have to go out and explore to find them all! This area is shrouded in mystery, as it will serve as the climax of Palworld’s main story and is said to be home to a Legendary Pal for you to catch.","score":0.5637388,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ign.com/wikis/palworld/Palworld_1.0_Details_and_Patch_Notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 Details and Patch Notes - Palworld Guide - IGN","content":"**Version 1.0** of **Palworld** has arrived, bringing with it an **official full release**, tonnes of new content, adjustments and fixes, and much more! This page acts as a comprehensive breakdown of Version 1.0 of Palworld, including a **link to the full Patch Notes**. ## New Pals. The new Mutation mechanic has been added, which **gives breeding a low chance of producing a Pal stronger than the normal breeding result.** Pals born from mutated eggs have higher stats and a unique passive skill. New Partner Skills have been added, and the Partner Skills of over 200 Pals have been reworked. - New: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by 1% for 5 seconds. - New: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog.
